name: CombiMon
author: Poki
description: CombiMon is a monster-raising game where you hatch, train, and care for adorable creatures! Start by hatching eggs and guiding your little companions to different places. Gather fruits from trees to feed them. Watch as your monsters upgrade and grow bigger and stronger, eventually laying eggs to expand your collection! Explore the monster album and set your sights on unlocking every unique creature. Can you become the ultimate monster trainer? How to play CombiMon? Move with WASD, the arrow keys or the joystick! Who created CombiMon? CombiMon is created by Entrevero Games. They have other amazing games on Poki: Vero Life - Dress Up & Decor , Kawaii Dress-Up , Fairy Dress-Up , Dungeons & Dress-Ups , Bearsus , Cozy Room Design , Full Metal Football , and Stick Fighter ! How can I play CombiMon for free? You can play CombiMon for free on Poki. Can I play CombiMon on mobile devices and desktop? CombiMon can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
